COMPUTER ENGINEERING

MAJOR REQUIREMENTS CMSC 131 – Object Oriented Programming I** CMSC 132 – Object Oriented Programming II CMSC 216 – Intro to Computer Systems CMSC 250 – Intro to Discrete Structures CMSC 330 – Organization of Progr Languages CMSC 351 – Algorithms CMSC 412 or ENEE447– Operating Systems ENEE 101 - Intro to Electrical & Comp Engr ENEE 200 - Engineering Ethics (HU/IS) ENEE 205 – Electric Circuits ENEE 222 – Elements of Discrete Signals ENEE 244 – Digital Logic Design ENEE 245 – Digital Circuits & Systems Lab ENEE 304 or ENEE 322 ENEE 324 or STAT400 ENEE 350 – Computer Organization ENEE 446 – Digital Computer Design Computer Engineering Electives*** (26) credits required Category A (min 6 crs; 3 crs at 300/400 lvl): Category A: Category B: Category C: Category C: Category D: Category E: Category F: Elective (Category A-F or Free Elective):

Requirements for Graduation: • Final 30 credits must be earned at UMD

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level

12 of the final 30 credits must be upper level major coursework

A minimum 2.00 cumulative UM GPA and satisfactory completion of all degree
